creator: insane@oneinsane.net
text:
The below error came from executaion of:   wmcdpaly -w -d /dev/cd0c

Apr  6 08:19:06 lunatic /kernel: (cd0:ncr0:0:4:0): READ SUB-CHANNEL. CDB: 42
+2 40 2 0 0 5 0 18 0
Apr  6 08:19:06 lunatic /kernel: (cd0:ncr0:0:4:0): ILLEGAL REQUEST asc:24,0
Apr  6 08:19:06 lunatic /kernel: (cd0:ncr0:0:4:0): Invalid field in CDB

Also same errors occur in the GNOME CD Player.

How-To-Repeat: 
	Compile Install and execute.
